creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Port archives/p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib fails to install at staging, with the error of non-existing Zlib.bs

Fix: removing the Zlib.bs from the pkg-plist will solve this problem. Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/archivers/p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib
make && make install
